name: sql-server-dynamic-suite
description: Suite completa SQL Server (Query, List, Describe, Search) con credenziali dinamiche.

args: dotnet build "${extensionPath}/gemini.dynamic.mcp.csproj" -c Release -v q >&2 && DOTNET_SYSTEM_GLOBALIZATION_INVARIANT=1 dotnet "${extensionPath}/bin/Release/net9.0/gemini.dynamic.mcp.dll"
